name: reply_to_conversation
description: Send a reply to an existing conversation in Help Scout. The reply is delivered to the customer via email. You can also add internal notes (visible only to agents) by setting the thread type to 'note'.

parameters.name: conversation_id
parameters.description: The ID of the conversation to reply to.

parameters.name: text
parameters.description: The reply message body in plain text or HTML.
parameters.example: Thank you for contacting us. I have updated your account settings as requested.

parameters.name: customer
parameters.description: Customer to attribute the reply to (if different from conversation customer).

parameters.name: draft
parameters.description: If true, save as a draft instead of sending immediately.

parameters.name: cc
parameters.description: Email addresses to CC on the reply.

body.text: Thank you for contacting us. I have updated your account settings as requested.
